userForm.bceidEmail: Email address associated with the BCeID user account
userForm.activeLabel: Active, user can login to LCFS portal
userForm.inactiveLabel: Inactive, user cannot login to LCFS portal
userForm.administrator: can add/edit IDIR users and assign roles and add/edit organizations, BCeID users and assign roles.
userForm.analyst: can make recommendations on transfers, transactions and compliance reports, manage and recommend CI applications and fuel codes.
userForm.compliance_manager: can make recommendations on compliance reports.
userForm.director: can assess compliance reports, approve transactions, fuel codes, initiative agreements and designated actions.
userForm.manage_users: can add/edit BCeID users and assign roles.
userForm.transfer: can create/save transfers and submit files.
userForm.compliance_reporting: can create/save compliance reports and submit files.
userForm.signing_authority: can sign and submit compliance reports to government and transfers to trade partners/government.
userForm.read_only: can view transactions, compliance reports and files.
userForm.ci_applicant: can access Fuel code tab and CI application subtab.
userForm.ia_analyst: can make recommendations on initiative agreements and designated actions.
userForm.ia_manager: can make recommendations on initiative agreements and designated actions.
userForm.ia_signer: can sign and submit IA submissions, designated actions and evidence to government. This role can only be assigned by government users.
userForm.system_admin: control report opening and login screen background.
userForm.complianceSection: Compliance reporting, transfers, CI applications & fuel codes

deleteUser.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
deleteUser.notSafe: User cannot be deleted due to existing activities.

loginBg.title: Login screen background
loginBg.description: Manage the background image displayed on the LCFS login page. Upload landscape photos and select one as the active background. Only one image can be active at a time.
loginBg.recommended: Recommended: JPEG or PNG, minimum 1920 × 1080 px, landscape orientation, under 10 MB. Images are scaled to fill the full browser viewport, so higher resolution will look sharper on large screens.
loginBg.dragDropText: Drag and drop your JPG or PNG file(s) here or
loginBg.clickToSelect: click to select files from your machine to upload
loginBg.minResolution: Images must be a minimum of 1440 x 900px
loginBg.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the image and cannot be undone.

seededAssoc.title: Seeded User Association
seededAssoc.description: Assign seeded {{env}} users to organizations and update BCeID roles.
seededAssoc.resolveOrgNameHelp: Enter either masked org name or original org name.
seededAssoc.resolveValidation: Enter an organization name and salt phrase.
seededAssoc.invalidRoleMix: Role selection includes roles that are not allowed for organization users.
seededAssoc.validation: Select a seeded user and organization before saving.
